particulars.description: A first fixed charge over (1) all its rights in each contract or policy of insurance effected or maintained from time to time in respect of all the assets, property and undertaking from time to time subject to the security interests created by the debenture dated 11 june 2026 (charged property) (2) the benefit of all other contracts, guarantees, appointments and warranties relating to the. Charged property (3) all authorisations (statutory or otherwise) held or required in connection with the business or the use of any charged property (4) all present or future freehold or leasehold property and all present and future rights, licences, guarantees, rents, deposits, contracts, covenants and warranties relating to such property (5) all present and future goodwill and uncalled capital for from time to time and all all present and future equipment, plant, machinery, tools, vehicles, furniture, fittings,. Installations and apparatus and other tangible moveable property.
